title: What music should I actually play in my store? — Daniel Fox
meta_description: The research answer comes down to one word: congruence. The music has to match your brand, your products, and your customer. Generic top-40 is a missed opportunity — here's what fit actually means.

schema.headline: What music should I actually play in my store?
schema.description: How to choose store music: match it to brand identity, products, and customer. The research on congruence and sales.
